title: Fix implement command timeout

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Fix default `implement --changed` so it does not time out on ordinary use.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep scope bounded to default implement performance; do not weaken selector/verbose diagnostics or proof selection semantics.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Use lazy projections, direct active-plan reads, and focused tests where the current default path computes expensive diagnostics unnecessarily.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Patch default implement to avoid broad planning, Memory, and reuse scans unless verbose or selected.

completion_criteria: Default `implement --changed` avoids the expensive full planning summary, memory report, and duplicate reuse scan.
Regression tests prove the tiny/default path does not compute deferred diagnostics.
